title: Active-Active Multi-Region Replication
description: Architect active-active multi-region replication strategies for geographically distributed data. Manage conflict resolution complexities, comparing Last-Write-Wins (LWW) and Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs), in multi-master environments.
objectives: Architect active-active multi-region replication strategies for geographically distributed data.
Manage conflict resolution complexities, comparing Last-Write-Wins (LWW) and Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs), in multi-master environments.
